positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring a celestial biome. The main subject is a harmonious merge of exotic, bioluminescent flora (like cosmic ferns and glowing roots) growing around a central, geometrically perfect crescent moon. The composition must utilize a deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, and sharp metallic gold palette, relying heavily on high-contrast black line art for definition. The style should evoke a blend of Art Deco symmetry, modern graphic novel illustration, and Japanese ukiyo-e minimalism. Clean silhouettes are essential. Designed specifically for maximal visibility on apparel prints, with a central, non-distracting subject placement.
negative: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, distorted, poorly drawn, cropped
